---
title: "Laura Hoare"
---

## Laura Hoare

**Dates:** (1852-1929)

**Maiden name:** (Cator, afterwards Lennard)

### Description

ward of Anne Sturges Bourne

### Biography

She and her sister Penelope were daughters of John Farnaby Cator (1816-1899), who assumed the surname Lennard and was created Sir John Lennard, 1st Bt. in 1880.  Their mother was his first wife Laura Golding (d.1850), who was cousin to Anne Sturges Bourne.  Laura Lennard married (1878) William Hoare (d.1925).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 14th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
